ddls:
CREATE TABLE "labor_force_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "ref_date" INTEGER /* Reference date for the data (year) */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to geographical location */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to labor force characteristics */,
  "naics_id" INTEGER /* Reference to NAICS classification */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to gender */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of employment (e.g., number of employed individuals) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_data_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES labor_force_characteristics ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_data_naics_id FOREIGN KEY ("naics_id") REFERENCES naics_codes ("naics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_data_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "geo_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical location */,
  "geo_type" TEXT /* Type of geographical area (e.g., province, city) */,
  "geo_code" TEXT /* Code for the geographical location */,
  "parent_geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to parent geographical location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographies_parent_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_force_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor force characteristic */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., Employment, Unemployment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the characteristic (e.g., employment status, education level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_codes" (
  "naics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NAICS code */,
  "naics_code" TEXT /* NAICS classification code */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry associated with the code */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the industry (e.g., goods-producing, service-providing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender type */,
  "gender_label" TEXT /* Label for the gender (e.g., Males, Females) */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Survey, Census) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data collection (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES labor_force_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used in the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source data used for the visualization */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the visualization belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
